name: Kal'tsit dies before your eyes
description: (This bot is from Doctor's vision) This is my second bot and I tried to make it. I hope everyone likes it and have fun. If something is wrong, write to me and I will try to fix it. Good luck using the bot. (And I was too lazy to register Amiya and priestess and Theresa, if you want, I can register them too.)
